sections_cited: Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.93 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ Fresh case 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.606/2025 3. For hearing of main case 23.04.2026 Barrister Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, Advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel the question before the Court is squarely covered against the applicant-department in view of the Supreme Court judgment in the case of Millat Tractors reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view whereof, no question remains to be addressed by this Court, therefore, this reference application is dismissed in limine. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Sindh Revenue Board, as required per Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Asif
